authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a detailed, practical guide with clear steps and implementation details.
Strong use of structured workflow and business impact metrics (KPIs, time savings) makes this content highly valuable.
Content includes specific tools, personas, and a case study which improves relevance and practical use.
The article effectively targets search intent with a focus on 'Informational' and includes a how-to guide format.
The content is detailed and provides sufficient context for readers to implement the guide.
Minor issues with some sections being too technical without sufficient explanation for beginner users.
Some technical implementation details may require prior workflow or automation experience.
recommendedFixes: Add a brief explanation or glossary for non-technical terms to improve accessibility for beginners.
Include a short summary or visual diagram for the workflow to further enhance clarity.
Add a section on prerequisites or required knowledge (e.g., familiarity with Make.com, Slack, Notion) for better reader preparedness.
Consider adding a short troubleshooting flowchart or table for common errors to improve usability.
Expand on the 'common mistakes' section with examples to better illustrate potential pitfalls.
